'''ây-v-ch''' ('''kayavach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:illegitimatize|illegitimatize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:illegitimatize|illegitimatize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kayavach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyavach|thiyavach]] || [[word:jiyavach|jiyavach]] || [[word:shiyavach|shiyavach]] || [[word:kiyavach|kiyavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyavach|thuthuyavach]] || [[word:jujuyavach|jujuyavach]] || [[word:shushuyavach|shushuyavach]] || [[word:kukuyavach|kukuyavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyavach|thuyavach]] || [[word:juyavach|juyavach]] || [[word:shuyavach|shuyavach]] || [[word:kuyavach|kuyavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyavach|thuyavach]] || [[word:juyavach|juyavach]] || [[word:shuyavach|shuyavach]] || [[word:kuyavach|kuyavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyavach|theyavach]] || [[word:jeyavach|jeyavach]] || [[word:sheyavach|sheyavach]] || [[word:keyavach|keyavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyavach|thothoyavach]] || [[word:jojoyavach|jojoyavach]] || [[word:shoshoyavach|shoshoyavach]] || [[word:kokoyavach|kokoyavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyavach|thoyavach]] || [[word:joyavach|joyavach]] || [[word:shoyavach|shoyavach]] || [[word:koyavach|koyavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyavach|thoyavach]] || [[word:joyavach|joyavach]] || [[word:shoyavach|shoyavach]] || [[word:koyavach|koyavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyavach|thĂŠyavach]] || [[word:jĂŠyavach|jĂŠyavach]] || [[word:shĂŠyavach|shĂŠyavach]] || [[word:kĂŠyavach|kĂŠyavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayavach|thathayavach]] || [[word:jajayavach|jajayavach]] || [[word:shashayavach|shashayavach]] || [[word:kakayavach|kakayavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayavach|thayavach]] || [[word:jayavach|jayavach]] || [[word:shayavach|shayavach]] || [[word:kayavach|kayavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayavach|thayavach]] || [[word:jayavach|jayavach]] || [[word:shayavach|shayavach]] || [[word:kayavach|kayavach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayavach|shayavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayavach|goshayavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayavach|gokishayavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayavachnĂŒ|shayavachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayavachnknĂŒ|goshayavachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavachnĂŒ|gokishayavachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayavachshĂ«|shayavachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayavachnkshĂ«|goshayavachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayavachshĂ«|gokishayavachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavachro|shayavachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavachnkro|goshayavachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavachro|gokishayavachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavachmu|shayavachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavachnkmu|goshayavachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavachmu|gokishayavachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayavachsher|shayavachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayavachnksher|goshayavachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayavachsher|gokishayavachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayavachng|shayavachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayavachnkng|goshayavachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayavachng|gokishayavachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayavachya|shayavachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayavachnkya|goshayavachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayavachya|gokishayavachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayavachyam|shayavachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayavachnkyam|goshayavachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayavachyam|gokishayavachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayavachnĂŒshĂ«|shayavachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayavachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayavachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayavachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayavachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavachnĂŒro|shayavachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavachnknĂŒro|goshayavachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavachnĂŒro|gokishayavachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavachnĂŒmu|shayavachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavachnknĂŒmu|goshayavachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavachnĂŒmu|gokishayavachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayavachshĂ«nĂŒ|shayavachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayavachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayavachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayavachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavachshĂ«ro|shayavachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavachnkshĂ«ro|goshayavachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavachshĂ«ro|gokishayavachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavachshĂ«mu|shayavachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavachnkshĂ«mu|goshayavachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavachshĂ«mu|gokishayavachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayavachronĂŒ|shayavachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayavachnkronĂŒ|goshayavachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavachronĂŒ|gokishayavachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayavachroshĂ«|shayavachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayavachnkroshĂ«|goshayavachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayavachroshĂ«|gokishayavachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayavachromu|shayavachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayavachnkromu|goshayavachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayavachromu|gokishayavachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayavachmunĂŒ|shayavachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayavachnkmunĂŒ|goshayavachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayavachmunĂŒ|gokishayavachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayavachmushĂ«|shayavachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayavachnkmushĂ«|goshayavachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayavachmushĂ«|gokishayavachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayavachmuro|shayavachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayavachnkmuro|goshayavachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayavachmuro|gokishayavachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
